pageContext.name: Junior Beast - Leo (Violet)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are proud to present the Junior Beast - Leo (Violet) Collectible Figure. This resin figure is beautifully crafted and stands 4.5 inches tall. It features glow-in-the-dark features to make it stand out and catch the eye at any time of day.  A joint collaboration between MANAS S+U+M and sculptor Akishi Ueda and Pony on Wheel Studio, the Junior Beast - Leo Collectible figures is a striking and beautifully surreal limited-edition collector's item that would be a great addition, or a great start, to any art collection.
